sql_overrides.value: SELECT TXN_ID, ACCOUNT_ID, TXN_TYPE, AMOUNT, CURRENCY, TXN_DATE, DECODE(STATUS, 'C', 'COMPLETED', 'P', 'PENDING', 'F', 'FAILED', STATUS) AS STATUS, NVL(CHANNEL, 'UNKNOWN') AS CHANNEL, TAGS FROM FINANCE.TRANSACTIONS WHERE TXN_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3)
SELECT ACCOUNT_ID AS BLOCKED_ACCOUNT_ID, NVL(REASON, 'Unspecified') AS BLOCK_REASON FROM COMPLIANCE.FRAUD_BLACKLIST WHERE ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y' AND EXPIRY_DATE > SYSDATE

lookup_conditions.sql: SELECT ACCOUNT_ID AS BLOCKED_ACCOUNT_ID, NVL(REASON, 'Unspecified') AS BLOCK_REASON FROM COMPLIANCE.FRAUD_BLACKLIST WHERE ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y' AND EXPIRY_DATE > SYSDATE

sql_overrides.value: SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, DEPARTMENT, MONTHLY_SALARY, HIRE_DATE, STATUS FROM HR.EMPLOYEES WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND HIRE_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -120)
SELECT DEPT_NAME, MANAGER_NAME FROM HR.DEPARTMENTS WHERE ACTIVE = 'Y'
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY DEPARTMENT ORDER BY ANNUAL_SALARY DESC) AS DEPT_SALARY_RANK FROM HR.EMPLOYEES

lookup_conditions.sql: SELECT DEPT_NAME, MANAGER_NAME FROM HR.DEPARTMENTS WHERE ACTIVE = 'Y'

sql_overrides.value: SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, NVL(DISCOUNT_PCT, 0) AS DISCOUNT_PCT, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_STATUS, CHANNEL FROM SALES.ORDERS WHERE ORDER_DATE >= TO_DATE('$$LOAD_DATE', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND ORDER_STATUS != 'CANCELLED'
SELECT PRODUCT_ID, NVL(PRODUCT_NAME, 'Unknown') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(CATEGORY, 'Uncategorized') AS CATEGORY FROM SALES.PRODUCTS

lookup_conditions.sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, NVL(PRODUCT_NAME, 'Unknown') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(CATEGORY, 'Uncategorized') AS CATEGORY FROM SALES.PRODUCTS

pre_post_sql.value: DELETE FROM SALES.FACT_ORDERS_STAGING WHERE ORDER_DATE = TO_DATE('$$LOAD_DATE','YYYY-MM-DD')

db_links.spark_equivalent: Configure separate JDBC connection for remote database
db_links.note: Replace @LoadDate with spark.read.jdbc() pointing to remote DB

global_temp_tables.note: Temp view persists like PRESERVE ROWS
